column1: # ESP32-S3 16MB Flash Partition Table (Dual App + Dual LittleFS OTA Layout)
# This layout provides full A/B redundancy for both the application firmware
# OTA Data: Tracks which app partition (ota_0 or ota_1) is currently active and booted.
# PHY Init: Stores physical layer (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) RF hardware initialization data.
# Offset 0x20000 aligns perfectly with the standard ESP32-S3 bootloader mapping.
# Primary Application Slot (Active on factory flash)
# Secondary Application Slot (Target for network OTA firmware updates)
# Custom 'littlefs' subtypes are parsed dynamically by the ESP-IDF VFS layer.
# Secondary Filesystem Slot (Target for network OTA filesystem updates)
